sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n11864" key="a)penta/ssw" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀπεντάσσω</orth>, <sense id="n11864.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">put back in its place,</tr_> of the prolapsed uterus, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:88" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.88</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
